Volcano plots of CorrelateGene results

PlotCorrelation.Rd

Draws one panel per cell type (and per comparison group when compare_by was used in CorrelateGene()) assembled with patchwork::wrap_plots(). Each panel shows the top n_pos most positively and top n_neg most negatively correlated genes so that both directions are always represented.

Usage

PlotCorrelation(
  cor_result,
  cell_type = NULL,
  n_pos = 15L,
  n_neg = 15L,
  label_n = 5L,
  padj_cutoff = 0.05,
  r_cutoff = NULL,
  ncol = NULL,
  output_dir = NULL,
  file_name = NULL
)

Arguments

cor_result

Data frame returned by CorrelateGene().

cell_type

Character vector or NULL. Cell types to plot (all by default).

n_pos

Integer. Top positive genes to show per panel. Default 15.

n_neg

Integer. Top negative genes to show per panel. Default 15.

label_n

Integer. Significant genes to label per direction per panel. Default 5 (5 positive + 5 negative).

padj_cutoff

Numeric. Significance threshold. Default 0.05.

r_cutoff

Numeric or NULL. Optional ±r dotted reference lines.

ncol

Integer or NULL. Columns in the assembled figure. NULL auto-selects: n_compare_groups when compare_by was used, else 3.

output_dir

Character or NULL. Directory to save a PDF.

file_name

Character or NULL. PDF base name.

Value

A patchwork object (invisibly when saved).

See also

CorrelateGene()

On this page
